subcodes.first_line: O Nabil! Most among the people have sought, and continue to seek, poison from the Truth, while in their own imagination, though desiring honey, they have asked for bitter colocynth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نبیلی اکثری از خلق از حق سم طلب نموده و مینمایند و بخیال خود شهد خواسته اند حنظل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @nearness and remoteness
